'''Benni''' was a young [[pack tracker]] at the [[Kuat Passenger Port]]. Using a [[Repulsorcart/Legends|repulsorcart]], he would offer his services as a porter to passengers moving through the [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. Extremely knowledgable about the Port and its working, Benni was friendly and chatty with his customers.

{{Char-stub}}
